---
title: "SEM"
author: "CLB"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(here)
source(here("Code/paths+packages.R"))

library(PerformanceAnalytics)
library(corrr)
library(corrplot)
library(cluster)
library(beepr)
library(glue)
library(cowplot)
library(ggExtra)
library(piecewiseSEM)
library(easystats)
library(glmmTMB)
set.seed(4) # For reproducibility
gpSites <- c("#1b9e77", "#d95f02", "#7570b3")
```

# Load Data

```{r}
sheet_id <- 
all_sheets <- map(c("Talladega", "Paint Rock", "Weyerhaeuser"), \(name) {
  read_sheet("1uQquFaVpRFs5y4UDBrqKtq1Oo3dW7zXLwFoIv-gle6g", sheet = name, col_types = "c") |>
    mutate(Site = name)
})

seMaint <- bind_rows(all_sheets) |> 
    janitor::clean_names() |> 
  mutate(
    temp_c = coalesce(temp_c, temperature_c),
    stage_m = coalesce(staff_gauge_height_m, staff_gauge_height),
    # Safely combine date + time
    Date = mdy(date)
  ) |> 
  dplyr::select(Site = site, Date, connected = connected_and_flowing, upstream = upstream_tribs_flowing, site_notes, do_mg_l, stage_m, temp_c) |> 
  mutate(
    connected = str_to_lower(connected),
    upstream = str_to_lower(upstream),
    flow_state = case_when(
      connected == "yes" ~ "Flowing",
      connected == "no" & upstream == "yes" ~ "Pooled",
      connected == "no" & upstream == "no" ~ "Dry",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) |> 
  mutate(
    flow_state = case_when(
      (flow_state %in% c("Dry", NA)) &
        str_detect(str_to_lower(site_notes), "\\b(flow|flowing|pool|pooled|isolated|low)\\b") ~ "Pooled",
      TRUE ~ flow_state
    )
  ) |> 
  dplyr::select(Site, Date, wetQf = flow_state) |> 
  mutate(
    Site = case_when(
      str_starts(Site, "T") ~ "TAL",
      str_starts(Site, "W") ~ "WHR",
      str_starts(Site, "P") ~ "PRF",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ))
```

```{r}
flowObs <- read_csv(here("Metadata/FlowObs.csv"))

streamLight <- read_csv(here("Data/streamLight/predLight/all_sites_results.csv")) |> 
  rename(Site = Site_ID) |> 
  mutate(
    Date = as_date(local_time),
    Site = case_when(
    Site == "SFM01" ~ "KNZ",
    Site == "SHM01" ~ "SHN",
    Site == "ENM01" ~ "YMR",
    TRUE ~ Site  # keep other values unchanged
  )) |> 
    group_by(Site, Date) |>
  summarise(maxPar = max(PAR_surface, na.rm = TRUE),
            avgPar = mean(PAR_surface, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")

nasaET <- read_csv(here("Data/nasaET.csv"))
# Load GP
gpDat <- read_csv(here("Data/GP_dailyData.csv")) |>
  dplyr::select(
    -minDO.obs, -maxDO.obs, -avgDO.obs, -DO.hyp, -DO.amp,
    -probHyp, -dayProbConc, -nightProbConc, -NHR_obs,
    -dPercCon, -wetdry_SW
  ) |>
  mutate(Date = as_date(Date)) |>
  left_join(streamLight, by = c("Site", "Date"))

# Load SE
seDat <- read_csv(here("Data/SE_dailyData.csv")) |>
  dplyr::select(
    -minDO.obs, -maxDO.obs, -avgDO.obs, -DO.hyp, -DO.amp,
    -probHyp, -dayProbConc, -nightProbConc, -NHR_obs
  ) |>
  mutate(Date = as_date(Date)) |>
  full_join(seMaint)

# Combine 
allDat <- gpDat |>
  full_join(seDat) |>
  left_join(nasaET) |> 
  dplyr::select(-excProb, -DOSat.exc) |>
  mutate(
    waterYear = as.factor(calcWaterYear(Date)),
    Season = as.factor(get_season(Date)),
    Date = as.Date(Date),
    DOY = as.numeric(format(Date, "%j")),
         DOY_sin = sin(2 * pi * DOY / (365 + leap_year(Date))),
         DOY_cos = cos(2 * pi * DOY / (365 + leap_year(Date)))
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(-totalDO) |>
  group_by(Site) |>
  mutate(
    excProb = calc_exceedance_prob(Q_1d, rm.zero = TRUE),
    DOSat.exc = calc_exceedance_prob(avgDO.pctsat, rm.zero = TRUE)
  ) |>
  ungroup()

# Calculate stage thresholds for each site
flowThresh <- allDat |>
  drop_na(wetQf) |>
  group_by(Site, wetQf) |>
  summarise(
    mean = mean(Depth_1d, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(Depth_1d, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  filter(wetQf == "Pooled" & !is.na(mean) & !is.na(sd)) |>
  mutate(thresh = mean + sd) |>
  dplyr::select(Site, thresh)

# Assign flowState based on threshold
allDat <- allDat |>
  left_join(flowThresh, by = "Site") |>
  mutate(across(
    .cols = matches("Depth_|maxDepth|minDepth"),
    .fns = \(x) ifelse(x < 0, 0, x)
  )) |> 
  mutate(
    percentConnected = percentConnected/100,
    flowState = case_when(
      is.na(thresh) ~ NA_character_,
      Depth_1d > thresh ~ "Flowing",
      TRUE ~ "Pooled"
    )
  ) |> 
  select(-c(ICSL, AlphaCentrality, Harary, IntactStreamLength, upstream_length, percentConnected, PercWet_1d, PercWet_7d, PercWet_14d, PercWet_30d))

rm(streamLight, gpDat, seDat, flowThresh, flowObs)

## New Alpha centrality
sticAC <- read_csv(here("Data/STICs/streamDAG_metrics.csv")) |> 
  rename(Date = date, Site = watershed) |> 
  filter(Site %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR", "TAL", "WHR", "PRF")) |> 
  select(Site, Date, PercWet_1d = percent_network_wet, upstream_length = active_upstream_length, a_cent_weighted, a_cent) |> 
  mutate(upstream_length = ifelse(is.na(upstream_length), 0, upstream_length))

# Kmeans Clusters
k_clust <- read_csv(here("Data/k_means_clusters.csv"))

allDat <- allDat |> 
  full_join(sticAC) |> 
  mutate(Q_1d = ifelse(is.na(Q_1d), 0, Q_1d)) |> 
  full_join(k_clust)

```

```{r}
#| include: false

numeric_vars <- allDat |>
  dplyr::select(where(is.numeric)) |>
  names() |>
  setdiff("DOY")

# Open a single PDF file
pdf(here("Figs/allDat_plots_scaled.pdf"),
    width = 8,
    height = 6)

# Generate and save plots to the PDF
suppressMessages(lapply(numeric_vars, \(var) {
  allDat |>
    group_by(Site) |>
    dplyr::mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ (. - mean(., na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(., na.rm = TRUE), .names = "{.col}")) |>
    ungroup() |>
    ggplot(aes(
      x = Date,
      y = !!sym(var),
      color = Site
    )) +
    geom_line() +
    labs(x = "", y = var) +
    theme_few() +
    scale_color_manual(values = okabeIto) +
    scale_x_date() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
    ) |>
    print()
}))

# Close the PDF
dev.off()


# Open a single PDF file
pdf(here("Figs/allDat_plots.pdf"),
    width = 8,
    height = 6)

# Generate and save plots to the PDF
suppressMessages(lapply(numeric_vars, \(var) {
  allDat |>
    ggplot(aes(
      x = Date,
      y = !!sym(var),
      color = Site
    )) +
    geom_line() +
    labs(x = "", y = var) +
    theme_few() +
    scale_color_manual(values = okabeIto) +
    scale_x_date() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
    ) |>
    print()
}))

# Close the PDF
dev.off()


allDat |> 
  ggplot(aes(PercWet_1d, avgDO.pctsat))+
  geom_point()+
  stat_poly_line()+
  stat_poly_eq()+
  theme_base() +
  facet_wrap(~Site, scales = "free")
```

## Autocorrelation

```{r}
vars <- c("ET_mm_day", "PPT_tot", "avgPar", "water.temp", "avgDO.pctsat", "headGradient", "DOpctsat.amp", "DOSat.exc", "PercWet", "a_cent_weighted", "upstream_length","Depth", "Q", "excProb")
 


dat_long <- allDat |>
  rename_with(~ str_remove(.x, "_1d")) |> 
  rename(PPT_tot = PPT) |> 
  dplyr::select(Site, Date, avgDO.pctsat, all_of(vars), PPT_14d) |> 
  filter(Site %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR")) |>
  group_by(Site) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    across(
      where(is.numeric) & !matches("PercWet|dPerc|DOY"), 
      ~ (. - mean(., na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(., na.rm = TRUE), 
      .names = "{.col}"
    )
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  drop_na(DOSat.exc, avgDO.pctsat) |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = -c(Site, Date), names_to = "metric", values_to = "value")

calc_acf <- function(x, max_lag = 90) {
  n_obs <- sum(!is.na(x))
  ci <- 1.96 / sqrt(n_obs)
  acf_out <- acf(x, lag.max = max_lag, plot = FALSE, na.action = na.pass)
  tibble(
    lag = acf_out$lag[,1,1],
    acf = acf_out$acf[,1,1],
    ci_upper = ci,
    ci_lower = -ci
  )
}
calc_pacf <- function(x, max_lag = 90) {
  n_obs <- sum(!is.na(x))
  ci <- 1.96 / sqrt(n_obs)
  pacf_out <- pacf(x, lag.max = max_lag, plot = FALSE, na.action = na.pass)
  tibble(
    lag = pacf_out$lag,
    pacf = pacf_out$acf,
    ci_upper = ci,
    ci_lower = -ci
  )
}

acf_results <- dat_long |>
  group_by(Site, metric) |>
  arrange(Date) |>
  summarise(acf_tbl = list(calc_acf(value)), .groups = "drop") |>
  unnest(acf_tbl)

pacf_results <- dat_long |>
  group_by(Site, metric) |>
  arrange(Date) |>
  summarise(pacf_tbl = list(calc_pacf(value)), .groups = "drop") |>
  unnest(pacf_tbl)

acf_results |>
  ggplot(aes(x = lag, y = acf)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "gray50", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper), fill = "#D6EAF8", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = lag, yend = 0), color = "#0072B2", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_grid(metric ~ Site, scales = "fixed") +
  labs(
    title = "Autocorrelation",
    x = "Lag (days)", y = "ACF"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) -> p
p
#ggsave(filename = "ACF.png", plot = p, path = here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 14.2875, units = "cm", dpi = "retina")

pacf_results |>
  ggplot(aes(x = lag, y = pacf)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "gray50", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper), fill = "#F8CFC3", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = lag, yend = 0), color = "#D55E00", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_grid(metric ~ Site, scales = "fixed") +
  labs(
    title = "Partial Autocorrelation",
    x = "Lag (days)", y = "PACF"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) -> p
p
#ggsave(filename = "PACF.png", plot = p, path = here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 14.2875, units = "cm", dpi = "retina")
```

## Correlation

```{r}
vars <- c("ET_mm_day", "PPT_tot", "avgPar", "water.temp", "avgDO.pctsat", "headGradient", "flowState", "DOpctsat.amp", "DOSat.exc", "PercWet", "a_cent_weighted", "upstream_length","Depth", "Q", "excProb", "DOY", "waterYear")


semDat <- allDat |>
  rename_with(~ str_remove(.x, "_1d")) |> 
  rename(PPT_tot = PPT) |> 
  dplyr::select(Site, Date, avgDO.pctsat, all_of(vars), PPT_14d) |> 
  filter(Site %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR")) |>
  group_by(Site) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    across(
      where(is.numeric), 
      ~ (. - mean(., na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(., na.rm = TRUE), 
      .names = "{.col}"
    )
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  drop_na(DOSat.exc, avgDO.pctsat) |> 
  mutate(#flowState = factor(flowState),
    # flowState = case_when(flowState == "Pooled"~0,
    #                       flowState == "Flowing"~1,
    #                       T~NA), 
    Site = factor(Site))

png(here("Figs/Corr.png"), width = 840, height = 840)
semDat |>
  group_by(Site) |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ scale(.)[, 1])) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(where(is.numeric)) |>
  cor(use = "complete.obs") |>
  (\(cor_mat) {
    corrplot(cor_mat, method = "circle", type = "upper", order = "alphabet", tl.col = "black", tl.pos = "lt", tl.cex = 2,
             cl.pos = "n", na.label = " ", diag = TRUE)
    corrplot(cor_mat, method = "number", type = "lower", order = "alphabet", tl.pos = "n", add = TRUE, number.cex = 1.5, na.label = " ", diag = FALSE)
  })()
dev.off()

png(here("Figs/Corr_5.png"), width = 840, height = 840)
semDat |>
  group_by(Site) |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ scale(.)[, 1])) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(where(is.numeric)) |>
  cor(use = "complete.obs") |>
  (\(cor_mat) {
    cor_mat[abs(cor_mat) < 0.5] <- NA
    corrplot(cor_mat, method = "circle", type = "upper", order = "alphabet", tl.col = "black", tl.pos = "lt", tl.cex = 2,
             cl.pos = "n", na.label = " ", diag = TRUE)
    corrplot(cor_mat, method = "number", type = "lower", order = "alphabet", tl.pos = "n", add = TRUE, number.cex = 1.5, na.label = " ", diag = FALSE)
  })()
dev.off()

png(here("Figs/Corr_75.png"), width = 840, height = 840)
semDat |>
  group_by(Site) |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ scale(.)[, 1])) |>
  ungroup() |> 
  select(where(is.numeric)) |>
  cor(use = "complete.obs") |>
  (\(cor_mat) {
    cor_mat[abs(cor_mat) < 0.75] <- NA
    corrplot(cor_mat, method = "circle", type = "upper", order = "alphabet", tl.col = "black", tl.pos = "lt", tl.cex = 2,
             cl.pos = "n", na.label = " ", diag = TRUE)
    corrplot(cor_mat, method = "number", type = "lower", order = "alphabet", tl.pos = "n", add = TRUE, number.cex = 1.5, na.label = " ", diag = FALSE)
  })()
dev.off()

```

# Rand Forest

```{r}
clust_col <- c("1" = "#0077BB", "2" = "#E69F00", "3" = "#BBBB00")

rf_vars <- c(
  "ET_mm_day",
  "avgPar", "PPT_14d",
  "water.temp",
  "upstream_length",
  "PercWet",
  "excProb",
  "Depth",
  "a_cent",
  "a_cent_weighted",
  "headGradient",
  "DOSat.exc",
  "DOpctsat.amp",
  "avgDO.pctsat"
)
rf_dat <- allDat |>
  rename_with(~ str_remove(.x, "_1d")) |>
  # rename(PPT_tot = PPT) |>
  # dplyr::select(Site, Date, avgDO.pctsat, all_of(rf_vars), cluster) |>
  filter(Site %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR")) |>
  drop_na(DOSat.exc, avgDO.pctsat) |>
  select(-c(NHR_sat, nightProbSat, dayProbSat, dMinDO.pctsat, dDOpctsat.amp, probHypSat, DOSat.slope, sdDO.pctsat, cvDO.pctsat, DOSat.hyp, minDO.pctsat, maxDO.pctsat, maxPar, starts_with("DOY"), minQ, maxQ, thresh, starts_with("head")))
rf_dat |>
  select(cluster, avgDO.pctsat, DOSat.exc, DOpctsat.amp) |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(avgDO.pctsat, DOSat.exc, DOpctsat.amp),
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "value"
  ) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(cluster), y = value, fill = factor(cluster))) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = clust_col) +
  labs(x = "Cluster", y = "Value", fill = "Cluster") +
  theme_minimal()


rf_model <- randomForest(clusters ~ ., data = scaledData |> dplyr::select(all_of(c("clusters", flow_vars, precip_vars, depth_vars, stic_vars, delta_vars, network_vars, "waterYear", "Season"))), importance = TRUE)
varImpPlot(rf_model)

# Extract variable importance
var_imp_df <- importance(rf_model) |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "Variable") |>
  arrange(desc(MeanDecreaseGini))

# Plot variable importance
ggplot(var_imp_df, aes(x = reorder(Variable, MeanDecreaseGini), y = MeanDecreaseGini)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_few() +
  labs(title = "Variable Importance For Clusters",
       x = "Predictor Variables",
       y = "Importance") +
  theme(legend.position = "none") ->p 
p
  ggsave(filename = "ClusterVarImportance.png", plot = p, path = here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 14.2875, units = "cm", dpi = "retina")

```

```{r}
library(caret)
set.seed(123)
rf_dat <- rf_dat |> 
  mutate(cluster = factor(cluster)) |> 
  select(-avgDO.pctsat, -DOSat.exc, -DOpctsat.amp) |> 
  arrange(Site, Date) |>
  group_by(Site) |>
  mutate(across(
    where(is.numeric),
    ~ na.approx(.x, x = Date, maxgap = 7, na.rm = FALSE),
    .names = "{.col}"
  )) |>
  ungroup() |> 
  filter(if_all(where(is.numeric), ~ !is.na(.x)))


# 1. Subset predictors and remove character/factor columns
predictors <- rf_dat |>
  select(where(is.numeric))

# 2. Remove highly correlated variables
cor_matrix <- cor(predictors, use = "complete.obs")
high_cor <- findCorrelation(cor_matrix, cutoff = 0.7)
predictors_filtered <- predictors[, -high_cor]

# 3. Recursive Feature Elimination (RFE)
control <- rfeControl(functions = rfFuncs, method = "cv", number = 5)

set.seed(123)
rfe_result <- rfe(
  x = predictors_filtered,
  y = rf_dat$cluster,
  sizes = c(5, 10, 15, 20, 23),
  rfeControl = control
)

# Keep only selected predictors
selected_vars <- predictors_filtered |>
  select(all_of(predictors(rfe_result)))

library(tidymodels)
library(randomForest)

# Combine predictors with response
rf_ready <- rf_dat |>
  select(Site, cluster) |>
  bind_cols(selected_vars)

# Create a model training function
train_rf_site <- function(df) {
  rf_model <- randomForest(
    cluster ~ .,
    data = df |> select(-Site),
    importance = TRUE
  )
  rf_model
}

# Train models per Site
rf_models <- rf_ready |>
  group_split(Site) |>
  setNames(unique(rf_ready$Site)) |>
  lapply(train_rf_site)

# 1. Extract importance as a tidy tibble
library(tidytext)
importance_long <- rf_models |>
  lapply(function(model) {
    importance(model, type = 1) |>
      as.data.frame() |>
      rownames_to_column("Variable")
  }) |>
  bind_rows(.id = "Site") |>
  group_by(Site) |>
  mutate(Variable = reorder_within(Variable, MeanDecreaseAccuracy, Site)) |>
  ungroup()

ggplot(importance_long, aes(x = Variable, y = MeanDecreaseAccuracy)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_wrap(~ Site, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_x_reordered() +
  labs(
    title = "Top Variable Importance by Site (Random Forest)",
    x = "Variable (ordered within Site)",
    y = "Mean Decrease in Accuracy"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
# data_split <- initial_split(rf_dat, prop = 0.8, strata = cluster)
# train_data <- training(data_split)
# test_data  <- testing(data_split)
# 
# rec <- recipe(cluster ~ ., data = train_data) |>
#   step_rm(Date) |> 
#   step_normalize(all_numeric_predictors()) |>
#   step_dummy(Site, one_hot = TRUE) 
# 
# rf_spec <- rand_forest(
#   mtry = tune(),
#   trees = tune(),
#   min_n = tune()
# ) |>
#   set_mode("classification") |>
#   set_engine("ranger",
#     importance = "permutation",
#     num.threads = parallel::detectCores() - 1
#   )
# 
# wf <- workflow() |>
#   add_recipe(rec) |>
#   add_model(rf_spec)
# 
# cv_folds <- vfold_cv(train_data, v = 5, strata = cluster)
# 
# rf_grid <- grid_random(
#   mtry(range = c(2L, 33L)),           # All predictors
#   min_n(range = c(2L, 10L)),
#   size = 30
# )
# # rf_grid <- grid_regular(
# #   mtry(range = c(2L, 20L)),
# #   min_n(range = c(2L, 10L)),
# #   levels = 5
# # )
# 
# rf_grid <- grid_space_filling(
#   mtry(range = c(3L, 20L)),
#   min_n(range = c(2L, 15L)),
#   size = 40,  # Try 40 combinations of parameters
#   trees(range = c(300, 900))
#   )
# 
# rf_tuned <- tune_grid(
#   wf,
#   resamples = cv_folds,
#   grid = rf_grid,
#   metrics = metric_set(accuracy, kap, roc_auc)
# )
# 
# best_params <- select_best(rf_tuned, metric = "accuracy")
# final_rf <- finalize_workflow(wf, best_params)
# rf_fit <- fit(final_rf, data = train_data)
# 
# 
# 
# # Evaluate 
# rf_preds <- predict(rf_fit, test_data) |> 
#   bind_cols(predict(rf_fit, test_data, type = "prob")) |>
#   bind_cols(test_data |> select(cluster))
# 
# # Precision by class
# precision_multiclass <- rf_preds |>
#   yardstick::precision(truth = cluster, estimate = .pred_class)
# 
# # Recall by class
# recall_multiclass <- rf_preds |>
#   yardstick::recall(truth = cluster, estimate = .pred_class)
# 
# # F1 by class
# f1_multiclass <- rf_preds |>
#   yardstick::f_meas(truth = cluster, estimate = .pred_class)
# 
# 
# rf_preds |> conf_mat(truth = cluster, estimate = .pred_class)
# rf_preds |> conf_mat(cluster, .pred_class) |> autoplot(type = "heatmap")
# 
# rf_fit |> 
#   extract_fit_parsnip() |>
#   vip::vip()
# 
# # ROC curves
# rf_preds |> 
#   roc_curve(truth = cluster, .pred_1, .pred_2, .pred_3) |> 
#   autoplot()
# 
# # PR curves
# rf_preds |> 
#   pr_curve(truth = cluster, .pred_1, .pred_2, .pred_3) |> 
#   autoplot()
# rf_preds |> roc_auc(truth = cluster, 
#                     .pred_1, .pred_2, .pred_3,
#                     estimator = "macro_weighted")

```

# Piecewise SEM

```{r}
semDat <- allDat |>
  rename_with(~ str_remove(.x, "_1d")) |> 
  rename(PPT_tot = PPT) |> 
  dplyr::select(Site, Date, avgDO.pctsat, all_of(vars), PPT_14d, ET_mm_day) |> 
  filter(Site %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR")) |>
  drop_na(DOSat.exc, avgDO.pctsat) 
```

```{r}
source(here("Code/Functions/prune_sem.R"))
# semDat <- semDat |>
#   group_by(Site) |> 
#   mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ scale(.)[, 1])) |>
#   ungroup() 

# Assign domain groups
domain_colors <- c(
  Biology = "#BBBB00",
  Hydrology = "#E69F00",
  DO = "#0077BB"
)

# Assign each variable to a domain
var_domains <- c(
  ET_mm_day = "Biology",
  avgPar = "Biology",
  PPT_14d = "Biology",
  water.temp = "Biology",
  upstream_length = "Hydrology",
  PercWet = "Hydrology",
  alpha_cent = "Hydrology",
  Depth = "Hydrology",
  excProb = "Hydrology",
  Q = "Hydrology",
  headGradient = "Hydrology",
  DOSat.exc = "DO",
  DOpctsat.amp = "DO",
  avgDO.pctsat = "DO"
)

# Assign each variable to a domain
var_labels <- c(
  ET_mm_day = "ET",
  avgPar = "PAR",
  PPT_14d = "14 Day PPT",
  water.temp = "Water Temp",
  upstream_length = "Upstream Length",
  PercWet = "% Network Wet",
  alpha_cent = "Alpha Centrality",
  Depth = "Depth",
  excProb = "Exceedance Probability",
  Q = "Discharge",
  headGradient = "Head Gradient",
  DOSat.exc = "DO Exceedance",
  DOpctsat.amp = "DO Amplitude",
  avgDO.pctsat = "Mean DO"
)
suppressWarnings(rm(acf_results, all_sheets, dat_long, p, pacf_results, seMaint, gpSites, okabeIto))
```

```{r}
numeric_vars <- semDat |>
  dplyr::select(where(is.numeric)) |>
  names() |>
  setdiff("DOY")

# Generate one ggplot per numeric variable
plots <- lapply(numeric_vars, \(var) {
  semDat |>
    ggplot(aes(x = DOY, y = !!sym(var), color = waterYear)) +
    geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8, na.rm = T) +
    labs(
      x = "DOY",
      y = var
    ) +
    theme_few() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~Site, ncol = 1)
})

# Optional: name plots list for easier reference
names(plots) <- numeric_vars

plots

semDat |>
  ggplot(aes(x = DOY, y = log(water.temp), color = waterYear)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8, na.rm = T) +
  labs(
    x = "DOY",
    y = "log(water.temp)"
  ) +
  theme_few() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Site, ncol = 1)

semDat |>
  ggplot(aes(x = DOY, y = log(avgPar), color = waterYear)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8, na.rm = T) +
  labs(
    x = "DOY",
    y = "log(avgPar)"
  ) +
  theme_few() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Site, ncol = 1)

sem_vars <- c(
  "ET_mm_day",
  "avgPar", "PPT_14d",
  "water.temp",
  "upstream_length",
  "PercWet",
  "excProb",
  "Depth",
  "headGradient",
  "DOSat.exc",
  "DOpctsat.amp",
  "avgDO.pctsat"
)


semDat |>
  ggplot(aes(x = DOY, y = Depth, color = Site)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8, na.rm = T) +
  labs(
    x = "DOY",
    y = "log(water.temp)"
  ) +
  theme_few() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~waterYear, ncol = 1)

```

```{r}
semDat <- allDat |>
  rename_with(~ str_remove(.x, "_1d")) |> 
  rename(PPT_tot = PPT) |> 
  dplyr::select(Site, Date, avgDO.pctsat, all_of(vars), PPT_14d, ET_mm_day) |> 
  filter(Site %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR")) |>
  drop_na(DOSat.exc, avgDO.pctsat)

std_dat <- semDat |>
  datawizard::standardize(select = -c(DOpctsat.amp, DOSat.exc))

semDat |>
  select(all_of(sem_vars)) |>
  #mutate(log_upstream_length = log1p(upstream_length)) |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = value)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Distributions of SEM Variables", x = NULL, y = "Count")


std_dat |>
  select(all_of(sem_vars)) |>
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = value)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
  theme_modern() +
  labs(title = "Distributions of SEM Variables", x = NULL, y = "Count")

semDat |>
  ggplot(aes(x = upstream_length)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  theme_modern() +
  labs(title = "Distributions of Upstream Length", x = NULL, y = "Count")
std_dat |>
  ggplot(aes(x = upstream_length)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  theme_modern() +
  labs(title = "Distributions of Scaled Upstream Length", x = NULL, y = "Count")
```

# glmmTMB

```{r}

semStd <- std_dat |>
  drop_na() 
#### if doing just lm, how does var importance change by site
# Biology
ET_mm_day <- glmmTMB(
  ET_mm_day ~ PPT_14d + avgPar + (1| Site) + (1 | Date),
  data = semStd,
  family = gaussian(link = "identity"),
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores)
)

water.temp <- glmmTMB(
  water.temp ~ avgPar + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day + (1| Site) + (1 | Date),
  data = semStd,
  family = gaussian(),  # Approximately normal
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores)
)

# Network Connectivity
upstream_length <- glmmTMB(
  upstream_length ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day +  (1|Site),
  data = semStd,
  family = gaussian(),
  ziformula = ~1,
  #family = gaussian(link = "identity"),  # Heavy right-skew
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores)
)

PercWet <- glmmTMB(
  PercWet ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day + (1 | Site) + (1|Date),
  data = semStd,
  family = gaussian(link = "identity"),#beta_family(link = "logit"),  # (0, 1) bounded, multimodal
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores)
)

# Depth/Q
excProb <- glmmTMB(
  excProb ~ avgPar + water.temp + PPT_14d + upstream_length + PercWet + ET_mm_day + (1 | Site),
  data = semStd,
  family = gaussian(link = "identity"),#beta_family(link = "logit"),  # (0, 1) bounded
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores))

headGradient <- glmmTMB(
  headGradient ~ avgPar + water.temp + excProb + PPT_14d + PercWet + ET_mm_day + (1 | Site),
  data = semStd,
  family = gaussian(), # Bell-shaped with slight skew
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores))

avgDO.pctsat <- glmmTMB(
  avgDO.pctsat ~ water.temp + avgPar + excProb + headGradient + upstream_length + PercWet + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day + (1 | Site) + (1 | Date),
  data = semStd,
  family = gaussian(),#beta_family(link = "logit"),  # Uniform [0,1]
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores))

DOpctsat.amp <- glmmTMB(
  DOpctsat.amp ~ water.temp + avgPar + excProb + headGradient + upstream_length + PercWet + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day + (1 | Site),
  data = semStd,
  family = Gamma(link = "log"),
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores)
)

# Create a list of model objects
model_list <- list(
  ET_mm_day = ET_mm_day,
  water.temp = water.temp,
  upstream_length = upstream_length,
  PercWet = PercWet,
  excProb = excProb,
  headGradient = headGradient,
  avgDO.pctsat = avgDO.pctsat,
  DOpctsat.amp = DOpctsat.amp
)

is_singular <- model_list |> lapply(check_singularity) |> bind_rows()
convergence_issues <- model_list |> lapply(function(m) m$fit$convergence) |> bind_rows()
inclass <- model_list |> lapply(icc) |> bind_rows()

plots <- Map(function(name, model) {
  model_parameters(model) |>
    plot() +
    ggtitle(name)
}, names(model_list), model_list)

# Display all plots
plots


# drop1_results <- lapply(model_list, function(mod) {
#   tryCatch(
#     drop1(mod, test = "Chisq"),
#     error = function(e) e  # catch models where drop1 fails (e.g., zero-inflated)
#   )
# })
#single_sem <- model_list |> lapply(function(m) summary(psem(m)))

#Generate and store the check_model plots in a list
# plot_list <- model_list |> lapply(check_model)
# #plot_list |> lapply(print)
# pdf(here("Figs/sem_model_diagnostics.pdf"), width = 11, height = 8.5)
# invisible(plot_list |> lapply(print))
# dev.off()

```

```{r}

all_mod <- psem(
  ET_mm_day = ET_mm_day,
  water.temp = water.temp,
  upstream_length = upstream_length,
  PercWet = PercWet,
  excProb = excProb,
  headGradient = headGradient,
  avgDO.pctsat = avgDO.pctsat,
  DOpctsat.amp = DOpctsat.amp,
  avgDO.pctsat %~~% DOpctsat.amp,
  PercWet %~~% upstream_length
)
all_summary <- summary(all_mod, standardize = "none") 

pruned_mod <- remove_weak_paths(sem_model =  all_mod)

pruned_summary <-  summary(pruned_mod, standardize = "none")  

plot_sem_graph(all_summary, file = here("Figs/SEM/all_fit_sem.png"))
plot_psem_chord(all_mod, var_domains, domain_colors, var_labels, file = here("Figs/SEM/all_fit_sem_chord.png"))

plot_sem_graph(pruned_summary, file = here("Figs/SEM/pruned_fit_sem.png"))
plot_psem_chord(pruned_mod, var_domains, domain_colors, var_labels, file = here("Figs/SEM/pruned_fit_sem_chord.png"))


```

## SEM by site

```{r}
library(nlme)
std_dat <- allDat |>
  filter(Site %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR")) |>
  arrange(Site, Date) |> 
  rename_with(~ str_remove(.x, "_1d")) |> 
  rename(PPT_tot = PPT) |> 
  dplyr::select(Site, Date, avgDO.pctsat, all_of(vars), PPT_14d, ET_mm_day) |> 
  drop_na(DOSat.exc, avgDO.pctsat) |> 
  group_by(Site) |> 
  datawizard::standardize(select = -c(DOpctsat.amp, DOSat.exc, avgDO.pctsat)) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  drop_na()


# Biology
##### Check vars for eachs site, make sure one is not all NA or something 

cor_struct <- corCAR1(form = ~ Date | Site)
ET_mm_day <- gls(ET_mm_day ~ PPT_14d + avgPar, data = std_dat, correlation = cor_struct)
water.temp <- gls(water.temp ~ avgPar + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day, data = std_dat, correlation = cor_struct)
upstream_length <- gls(upstream_length ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day, data = std_dat, correlation = cor_struct)
PercWet <- gls(PercWet ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day, data = std_dat, correlation = cor_struct)
excProb <- gls(excProb ~ avgPar + water.temp + PPT_14d + upstream_length + PercWet + ET_mm_day, data = std_dat, correlation = cor_struct)
headGradient <- gls(headGradient ~ avgPar + water.temp + excProb + PPT_14d + PercWet + ET_mm_day, data = std_dat, correlation = cor_struct)
avgDO.pctsat <- gls(avgDO.pctsat ~ water.temp + avgPar + excProb + headGradient + upstream_length + PercWet + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day, data = std_dat, correlation = cor_struct, control =  glsControl(opt = "optim") )
DOpctsat.amp <- gls(DOpctsat.amp ~ water.temp + avgPar + excProb + headGradient + upstream_length + PercWet + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day, data = std_dat, correlation = cor_struct)

model_list <- list(
  ET_mm_day = ET_mm_day,
  water.temp = water.temp,
  upstream_length = upstream_length,
  PercWet = PercWet,
  excProb = excProb,
  headGradient = headGradient,
  avgDO.pctsat = avgDO.pctsat,
  DOpctsat.amp = DOpctsat.amp
)





is_singular <- model_list |> lapply(check_singularity) |> bind_rows()

plots <- Map(function(name, model) {
  model_parameters(model) |>
    plot() +
    ggtitle(name)
}, names(model_list), model_list)

# Display all plots
plots
plot_list <- model_list |> lapply(check_model)
#plot_list |> lapply(print)
pdf(here("Figs/model_diagnostics.pdf"), width = 11, height = 8.5)
invisible(plot_list |> lapply(print))
dev.off()


```

```{r}
# Check ACF of residuals for each model
library(forecast)
library(TSA)

# For all models at once
acf_plots <- Map(function(name, model) {
  par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
  acf(residuals(model, type = "normalized"), main = paste("ACF -", name))
  #pacf(residuals(model, type = "normalized"), main = paste("PACF -", name))
}, names(model_list), model_list)

# Test different correlation structures for the models
test_correlation_structures <- function(formula_obj, data, model_name) {
  cli::cli_h1("Testing correlation structures for {.strong {model_name}}")
  
  # Extract formula from existing model
  formula_str <- paste(deparse(formula_obj$call$model), collapse = " ")
  formula_parsed <- as.formula(formula_str)
  
  models <- list()
  
  cli::cli_alert_info("Fitting CAR(1) model...")
  models$CAR1 <- tryCatch({
    model <- gls(formula_parsed, data = data, correlation = corCAR1(form = ~ Date | Site))
    cli::cli_alert_success("CAR(1) fit successfully.")
    model
  }, error = function(e1) {
    cli::cli_alert_warning("CAR(1) fit failed: {e1$message}")
    cli::cli_alert_info("Retrying CAR(1) with {.code opt = 'optim'}...")
    
    tryCatch({
      model <- gls(formula_parsed, data = data,
                   correlation = corCAR1(form = ~ Date | Site),
                   control = glsControl(opt = "optim"))
      cli::cli_alert_success("CAR(1) fit successfully with {.code opt = 'optim'}.")
      model
    }, error = function(e2) {
      cli::cli_alert_danger("CAR(1) retry failed: {e2$message}")
      NULL
    })
  })
  
  # Try ARMA structures
  arma_structures <- list(
    ARMA11 = list(p = 1, q = 1),
    ARMA21 = list(p = 2, q = 1),
    AR2    = list(p = 2, q = 0),
    AR3    = list(p = 3, q = 0),
    AR22   = list(p = 2, q = 2),
    AR31   = list(p = 3, q = 1),
    AR4    = list(p = 4, q = 0)
  )
  
  for (name in names(arma_structures)) {
    p <- arma_structures[[name]]$p
    q <- arma_structures[[name]]$q
    cli::cli_alert_info("Fitting {name} (p = {p}, q = {q})...")
    try({
      models[[name]] <- gls(formula_parsed, data = data,
                            correlation = corARMA(form = ~ Date | Site, p = p, q = q))
      cli::cli_alert_success("{name} fit successfully.")
    }, silent = TRUE)
  }
  
  # Compare AIC values
  cli::cli_h2("Model comparison by AIC")
  aic_values <- sapply(models, function(m) if (!is.null(m)) AIC(m) else NA)
  aic_values <- aic_values[!is.na(aic_values)]
  print(sort(aic_values))
  
  # Test autocorrelation in best model
  best_model_name <- names(which.min(aic_values))
  best_model <- models[[best_model_name]]
  resids <- residuals(best_model, type = "normalized")
  lb_test <- Box.test(resids, lag = 10, type = "Ljung-Box")
  
  cli::cli_alert_success("Best model: {.strong {best_model_name}} (AIC = {round(min(aic_values), 2)})")
  cli::cli_alert_info("Ljung-Box p-value: {round(lb_test$p.value, 4)}")
  if (lb_test$p.value < 0.05) {
  cli::cli_alert_warning("Ljung-Box test suggests residual autocorrelation (p = {round(lb_test$p.value, 4)})")
  }
  
  return(list(
    models = models,
    best_model = best_model_name,
    best_aic = min(aic_values),
    ljung_box_p = lb_test$p.value
  ))
}

mod_names <- c("ET_mm_day", "water.temp", "upstream_length", "PercWet", "excProb", "headGradient", "avgDO.pctsat", "DOpctsat.amp")

correlation_tests <- list()
for(model_name in mod_names) {
  correlation_tests[[model_name]] <- test_correlation_structures(
    model_list[[model_name]], std_dat, model_name
  )
}
summary_df <- lapply(names(correlation_tests), function(name) {
  res <- correlation_tests[[name]]
  data.frame(
    model = name,
    best_structure = res$best_model,
    AIC = res$best_aic,
    LjungBox_p = res$ljung_box_p
  )
}) |> do.call(rbind, args = _)
summary_df$sig_cor <- summary_df$LjungBox_p < 0.05


# Excellent fits
ET_mm_day <- gls(ET_mm_day ~ PPT_14d + avgPar,
  data = std_dat,
  correlation = corARMA(form = ~Date|Site, p = 2, q = 1)
)
# Marginal but usable
water.temp <- gls(water.temp ~ avgPar + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day,
  data = std_dat,
  correlation = corARMA(form = ~Date|Site, p = 2, q = 2)
)

upstream_length <- gls(upstream_length ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day,
  data = std_dat,
  correlation = corARMA(form = ~Date|Site, p = 3, q = 0)
)

PercWet <- gls(PercWet ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day,
  data = std_dat,
  correlation = corARMA(form = ~Date|Site, p = 4, q = 0)
)
#Sus
excProb <- gls(excProb ~ avgPar + water.temp + PPT_14d + upstream_length + PercWet + ET_mm_day,
  data = std_dat, correlation = corARMA(form = ~Date|Site, p = 4, q = 0)
)
#Sus
headGradient <- gls(
  headGradient ~ avgPar + water.temp + excProb + PPT_14d + PercWet + ET_mm_day,
  data = std_dat,
  correlation = corARMA(form = ~Date|Site, p = 3, q = 1)
)
avgDO.pctsat <- gls(
  avgDO.pctsat ~ water.temp + avgPar + excProb + headGradient +
    upstream_length + PercWet + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day,
  data = std_dat,
  correlation = corARMA(form = ~Date|Site, p = 4, q = 0)
)

DOpctsat.amp <- gls(
  DOpctsat.amp ~ water.temp + avgPar + excProb + headGradient +
    upstream_length + PercWet + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day,
  data = std_dat,
  correlation = corARMA(form = ~Date|Site, p = 1, q = 1)
)

final_models <- list( 
  ET_mm_day = ET_mm_day,
  water.temp = water.temp,
  upstream_length = upstream_length,
  PercWet = PercWet,
  excProb = excProb,
  headGradient = headGradient,
  avgDO.pctsat = avgDO.pctsat,
  DOpctsat.amp = DOpctsat.amp
  )


plots <- Map(function(name, model) {
  model_parameters(model) |>
    plot() +
    ggtitle(name)
}, names(final_models), final_models)

# Display all plots
plots
plot_list <- final_models |> lapply(check_model)
#plot_list |> lapply(print)
pdf(here("Figs/all_model_diagnostics_cor.pdf"), width = 11, height = 8.5)
invisible(plot_list |> lapply(print))
dev.off()

# For all models at once
acf_plots <- Map(function(name, model) {
  par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
  acf(residuals(model, type = "normalized"), main = paste("ACF -", name))
  pacf(residuals(model, type = "normalized"), main = paste("PACF -", name))
}, names(final_models), final_models)


sem <- psem(
  ET_mm_day,
  water.temp,
  upstream_length,
  PercWet,
  excProb,
  headGradient,
  avgDO.pctsat,
  DOpctsat.amp,
  data = std_dat)

semGroup <- multigroup(
  sem,
  group = "Site"
)

sem_summary <- summary(sem, standardize = "none")
plot_sem_graph(sem_summary, file = here("Figs/SEM/lme_all_fit_sem.png"))
plot_psem_chord(sem, var_domains, domain_colors, var_labels, file = here("Figs/SEM/lme_all_fit_sem_chord.png"))
```

```{r}
library(rEDM)

run_ccm_full <- function(data,
                         outcomes = c("DOpctsat.amp", "avgDO.pctsat"),
                         exclude_cols = c("Site", "Date", "DOY", "waterYear"),
                         lags = c(0, 1, 2, -1, -2),
                         lib_sizes = c(20, 100, 10),
                         n_samples = 100,
                         verbose = TRUE) {
  
  library(dplyr)
  library(rEDM)
  
  all_sites <- unique(data$Site)
  results <- list()
  
  for (site in all_sites) {
    site_data <- data |>
      filter(Site == site) |>
      arrange(Date)
    
    predictors <- setdiff(names(site_data), c(outcomes, exclude_cols))
    
    for (response in outcomes) {
      y <- site_data[[response]]
      y_sd <- suppressWarnings(sd(y, na.rm = TRUE))
      if (is.null(y) || all(is.na(y)) || sum(!is.na(y)) < 10 || is.na(y_sd) || y_sd == 0) next

      
      # Build a small two-column data frame: time + response
      embed_data <- site_data |>
        select(Date, all_of(response)) |>
        na.omit()
      
      # Use EmbedDimension to get the best E
      simplex_out <- tryCatch({
        EmbedDimension(
          dataFrame = embed_data,
          columns = response,
          target = response,
          lib = paste(1, nrow(embed_data)),
          pred = paste(1, nrow(embed_data)),
          maxE = 10,
          verbose = verbose
        )
      }, error = function(e) NULL)
      
      if (!is.null(simplex_out)) {
        best_E <- simplex_out[which.max(simplex_out$rho), "E"]
      }
      
      for (predictor in predictors) {
        x <- site_data[[predictor]]
        x_sd <- suppressWarnings(sd(x, na.rm = TRUE))
        if (is.null(x) || all(is.na(x)) || sum(!is.na(x)) < 10 || is.na(x_sd) || x_sd == 0) next

        
        ccm_input <- site_data |>
          select(Date, all_of(c(predictor, response))) |>
          na.omit() 
        
        if (nrow(ccm_input) < best_E + max(lib_sizes)) next
        
        for (tp_val in lags) {
          try_result <- tryCatch({
            ccm_out <- CCM(
              dataFrame = ccm_input,
              E = best_E,
              Tp = tp_val,
              columns = predictor,
              target = response,
              libSizes = paste(lib_sizes, collapse = " "),
              sample = n_samples,
              random = TRUE,
              seed = 0,
              includeData = TRUE,
              verbose = verbose
            )
            
            rho_df <- ccm_out$Combo_rho |>
              rename(lib_size = LibSize,
                     rho_pred_from_target = rho_1,
                     rho_pred_from_predictor = rho_2) |>
              mutate(Site = site,
                     Outcome = response,
                     Predictor = predictor,
                     TP = tp_val,
                     E = best_E)
            
            return(rho_df)
          }, error = function(e) NULL)
          
          if (!is.null(try_result)) {
            results[[length(results) + 1]] <- try_result
            if (verbose) cat("✓", site, response, predictor, "TP =", tp_val, "\n")
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  if (length(results) == 0) return(tibble())
  bind_rows(results)
}


ccm_results <- run_ccm_full(std_dat, lags = c(0, 1, 2, -1, -2), verbose = TRUE)
ccm_results |>
  filter(lib_size == max(lib_size)) |>
  arrange(desc(rho_mean)) |>
  print(n = 20)



ccm_summary_df |>
  filter(Predictor %in% c("avgPar", "PPT_tot")) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = lib_size, y = rho_mean, color = Predictor)) +
  geom_line() +
  facet_grid(Site ~ Outcome) +
  labs(title = "CCM: Cross Map Skill vs Library Size")
```

```{r}
knz_dat <- allDat |>
  filter(Site %in% c("KNZ")) |>
  arrange(Date) |> 
  rename_with(~ str_remove(.x, "_1d")) |> 
  rename(PPT_tot = PPT) |> 
  dplyr::select(Site, Date, avgDO.pctsat, all_of(vars), PPT_14d, ET_mm_day) |> 
  drop_na(DOSat.exc, avgDO.pctsat) |> 
  datawizard::standardize(select = -c(DOpctsat.amp, DOSat.exc)) |> 
  drop_na()
# Excellent fits
ET_mm_day <- gls(ET_mm_day ~ PPT_14d + avgPar,
  data = knz_dat,
  correlation = corARMA(form = ~Date, p = 2, q = 1)
)
# Marginal but usable
water.temp <- gls(water.temp ~ avgPar + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day,
  data = knz_dat,
  correlation = corARMA(form = ~Date, p = 2, q = 2)
)

upstream_length <- gls(upstream_length ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day,
  data = knz_dat,
  correlation = corARMA(form = ~Date, p = 2, q = 1)
)

PercWet <- gls(PercWet ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day,
  data = knz_dat,
  correlation = corARMA(form = ~Date, p = 2, q = 0)
)
#Sus
excProb <- gls(excProb ~ avgPar + water.temp + PPT_14d + upstream_length + PercWet + ET_mm_day,
  data = knz_dat, correlation = corARMA(form = ~Date, p = 3, q = 2)
)
#Sus
headGradient <- gls(
  headGradient ~ avgPar + water.temp + excProb + PPT_14d + PercWet + ET_mm_day,
  data = knz_dat,
  correlation = corARMA(form = ~Date, p = 4, q = 1)
)
avgDO.pctsat <- gls(
  avgDO.pctsat ~ water.temp + avgPar + excProb + headGradient +
    upstream_length + PercWet + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day,
  data = knz_dat,
  correlation = corARMA(form = ~Date, p = 3, q = 0)
)

DOpctsat.amp <- gls(
  DOpctsat.amp ~ water.temp + avgPar + excProb + headGradient +
    upstream_length + PercWet + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day,
  data = knz_dat,
  correlation = corARMA(form = ~Date, p = 3, q = 0)
)

final_models <- list( 
  ET_mm_day = ET_mm_day,
  water.temp = water.temp,
  upstream_length = upstream_length,
  PercWet = PercWet,
  excProb = excProb,
  headGradient = headGradient,
  avgDO.pctsat = avgDO.pctsat,
  DOpctsat.amp = DOpctsat.amp
  )


plots <- Map(function(name, model) {
  model_parameters(model) |>
    plot() +
    ggtitle(name)
}, names(final_models), final_models)

# Display all plots
plots
plot_list <- final_models |> lapply(check_model)
#plot_list |> lapply(print)
pdf(here("Figs/knz_model_diagnostics_cor.pdf"), width = 11, height = 8.5)
invisible(plot_list |> lapply(print))
dev.off()

# For all models at once
acf_plots <- Map(function(name, model) {
  par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
  acf(residuals(model, type = "normalized"), main = paste("ACF -", name))
  pacf(residuals(model, type = "normalized"), main = paste("PACF -", name))
}, names(final_models), final_models)



knz_sem <- psem(
  ET_mm_day,
  water.temp,
  upstream_length,
  PercWet,
  excProb,
  headGradient,
  avgDO.pctsat,
  DOpctsat.amp,
  PercWet %~~% upstream_length,
  data = knz_dat
)

knz_sem_summary <- summary(knz_sem, standardize = "none")
knz_sem_summary
plot_sem_graph(knz_sem_summary, file = here("Figs/SEM/knz_all_fit_sem.png"))
plot_psem_chord(knz_sem, var_domains, domain_colors, var_labels, file = here("Figs/SEM/knz_all_fit_sem_chord.png"))
```

```{r}

shn_dat <- allDat |>
  filter(Site %in% c("SHN")) |>
  arrange(Date) |> 
  rename_with(~ str_remove(.x, "_1d")) |> 
  rename(PPT_tot = PPT) |> 
  dplyr::select(Site, Date, avgDO.pctsat, all_of(vars), PPT_14d, ET_mm_day) |> 
  drop_na(DOSat.exc, avgDO.pctsat) |> 
  datawizard::standardize(select = -c(DOpctsat.amp, DOSat.exc)) |> 
  drop_na()
# Excellent fits
ET_mm_day <- gls(ET_mm_day ~ PPT_14d + avgPar,
  data = shn_dat,
  correlation = corARMA(form = ~Date, p = 2, q = 1)
)
# Marginal but usable
water.temp <- gls(water.temp ~ avgPar + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day,
  data = shn_dat,
  correlation = corARMA(form = ~Date, p = 2, q = 2)
)

upstream_length <- gls(upstream_length ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day,
  data = shn_dat,
  correlation = corARMA(form = ~Date, p = 2, q = 1)
)

PercWet <- gls(PercWet ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day,
  data = shn_dat,
  correlation = corARMA(form = ~Date, p = 2, q = 0)
)
#Sus
excProb <- gls(excProb ~ avgPar + water.temp + PPT_14d + upstream_length + PercWet + ET_mm_day,
  data = shn_dat, correlation = corARMA(form = ~Date, p = 3, q = 2)
)
#Sus
headGradient <- gls(
  headGradient ~ avgPar + water.temp + excProb + PPT_14d + PercWet + ET_mm_day,
  data = shn_dat,
  correlation = corARMA(form = ~Date, p = 4, q = 1)
)
avgDO.pctsat <- gls(
  avgDO.pctsat ~ water.temp + avgPar + excProb + headGradient +
    upstream_length + PercWet + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day,
  data = shn_dat,
  correlation = corARMA(form = ~Date, p = 3, q = 0)
)

DOpctsat.amp <- gls(
  DOpctsat.amp ~ water.temp + avgPar + excProb + headGradient +
    upstream_length + PercWet + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day,
  data = shn_dat,
  correlation = corARMA(form = ~Date, p = 3, q = 0)
)

final_models <- list( 
  ET_mm_day = ET_mm_day,
  water.temp = water.temp,
  upstream_length = upstream_length,
  PercWet = PercWet,
  excProb = excProb,
  headGradient = headGradient,
  avgDO.pctsat = avgDO.pctsat,
  DOpctsat.amp = DOpctsat.amp
  )


plots <- Map(function(name, model) {
  model_parameters(model) |>
    plot() +
    ggtitle(name)
}, names(final_models), final_models)

# Display all plots
plots
plot_list <- final_models |> lapply(check_model)
#plot_list |> lapply(print)
pdf(here("Figs/shn_model_diagnostics_cor.pdf"), width = 11, height = 8.5)
invisible(plot_list |> lapply(print))
dev.off()

# For all models at once
acf_plots <- Map(function(name, model) {
  par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
  acf(residuals(model, type = "normalized"), main = paste("ACF -", name))
  pacf(residuals(model, type = "normalized"), main = paste("PACF -", name))
}, names(final_models), final_models)



shn_sem <- psem(
  ET_mm_day,
  water.temp,
  upstream_length,
  PercWet,
  excProb,
  headGradient,
  avgDO.pctsat,
  DOpctsat.amp,
  PercWet %~~% upstream_length,
  data = shn_dat
)

shn_sem_summary <- summary(shn_sem, standardize = "none")
shn_sem_summary
plot_sem_graph(shn_sem_summary, file = here("Figs/SEM/shn_all_fit_sem.png"))
plot_psem_chord(shn_sem, var_domains, domain_colors, var_labels, file = here("Figs/SEM/shn_all_fit_sem_chord.png"))
```

## W/ Depth

```{r}
library(cowplot) # For arranging plots

# Function to create biplots
create_biplot <- function(response_var, predictors, data, title) {
  # Create a long format dataframe for plotting
  plot_data <- data.frame(
    Response = data[[response_var]],
    data[, predictors]
  )
  
  # Convert to long format
  plot_data_long <- tidyr::gather(plot_data, key = "Predictor", value = "Value", -Response)
  
  # Create the plot
  ggplot(plot_data_long, aes(x = Value, y = Response)) +
    geom_point2(alpha = 0.3, na.rm = T) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "blue") +
    facet_wrap(~ Predictor, scales = "free_x") +
    labs(title = title, 
         x = "Predictor Value", 
         y = response_var) +
    theme_modern() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
}

# Define predictors
predictors <- c("water.temp", "avgPar", "excProb", "headGradient", 
                "upstream_length", "PercWet", "PPT_14d", "ET_mm_day")

# Create plots for DOSat.exc
p1 <- create_biplot("DOSat.exc", predictors, semDat, "Unstandardized Data - DOSat.exc")
p2 <- create_biplot("DOSat.exc", predictors, semStd, "Standardized Data - DOSat.exc")

# Create plots for DOpctsat.amp
p3 <- create_biplot("DOpctsat.amp", predictors, semDat, "Unstandardized Data - DOpctsat.amp")
p4 <- create_biplot("DOpctsat.amp", predictors, semStd, "Standardized Data - DOpctsat.amp")

# Arrange and display plots
plot_grid(p1, p2)
plot_grid(p3, p4)

```

```{r}
semDat <- allDat |>
  rename_with(~ str_remove(.x, "_1d")) |> 
  rename(PPT_tot = PPT) |> 
  dplyr::select(Site, Date, avgDO.pctsat, all_of(vars), PPT_14d, ET_mm_day) |> 
  filter(Site %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR")) |>
  drop_na(DOSat.exc, avgDO.pctsat)

semStd <- semDat# |>
  #datawizard::standardize(select = -c(DOpctsat.amp, DOSat.exc))

semDat |>
  select(all_of(sem_vars)) |>
  mutate(log_upstream_length = log1p(upstream_length)) |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = value)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Distributions of SEM Variables", x = NULL, y = "Count")


semStd |>
  select(all_of(sem_vars)) |>
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = value)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
  theme_modern() +
  labs(title = "Distributions of SEM Variables", x = NULL, y = "Count")

semDat |>
  ggplot(aes(x = upstream_length)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  theme_modern() +
  labs(title = "Distributions of Upstream Length", x = NULL, y = "Count")
semStd |>
  ggplot(aes(x = upstream_length)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  theme_modern() +
  labs(title = "Distributions of Scaled Upstream Length", x = NULL, y = "Count")
```

```{r}
library(glmmTMB)
semStd <- semStd |>
  drop_na() |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    upstream_length = upstream_length + 0.001,
    ET_mm_day = ET_mm_day + 0.001,
    excProb = (excProb + 0.001) / 1.002,
    PercWet = (PercWet + 0.001) / 100.002
  )

# Biology
ET_mm_day <- glmmTMB(
  ET_mm_day ~ PPT_14d + avgPar + (1| Site) + (1 | Date),
  data = semStd,
  family = Gamma(link = "log"),
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores)
)

water.temp <- glmmTMB(
  water.temp ~ avgPar + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day + (1| Site) + (1 | Date),
  data = semStd,
  family = gaussian(),  # Approximately normal
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores)
)

# Network Connectivity
upstream_length <- glmmTMB(
  upstream_length ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day +  (1|Site),
  data = semStd,
  family = Gamma(link = "log"), ziformula = ~1,
  #family = gaussian(link = "identity"),  # Heavy right-skew
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores)
)

PercWet <- glmmTMB(
  PercWet ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day + (1 | Site) + (1|Date),
  data = semStd,
  family = beta_family(link = "logit"),
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores,
                           optimizer = optim,
                           optArgs = list(method="BFGS"))
)

# Depth/Q
excProb <- glmmTMB(
  excProb ~ avgPar + water.temp + PPT_14d + upstream_length + PercWet + ET_mm_day + (1 | Site),
  data = semStd,
  family = beta_family(link = "logit"),  # (0, 1) bounded
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores,
                           optimizer = optim,
                           optArgs = list(method="BFGS")))

headGradient <- glmmTMB(
  headGradient ~ avgPar + water.temp + excProb + PPT_14d + PercWet + ET_mm_day + (1 | Site),
  data = semStd,
  family = gaussian(), # Bell-shaped with slight skew
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores))

avgDO.pctsat <- glmmTMB(
  avgDO.pctsat ~ water.temp + avgPar + excProb + headGradient + upstream_length + PercWet + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day + (1 | Site),
  data = semStd,
  family = Gamma(link = "log"),#beta_family(link = "logit"),  # Uniform [0,1]
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores, 
                           optimizer = optim,
                           optArgs = list(method="BFGS")))

DOpctsat.amp <- glmmTMB(
  DOpctsat.amp ~ water.temp + avgPar + excProb + headGradient + upstream_length + PercWet + PPT_14d + ET_mm_day + (1 | Site),
  data = semStd,
  family = Gamma(link = "log"),
  control = glmmTMBControl(parallel = nCores)
)

# Create a list of model objects
model_list <- list(
  ET_mm_day = ET_mm_day,
  water.temp = water.temp,
  upstream_length = upstream_length,
  PercWet = PercWet,
  excProb = excProb,
  headGradient = headGradient,
  avgDO.pctsat = avgDO.pctsat,
  DOpctsat.amp = DOpctsat.amp
)


is_singular <- model_list |> lapply(check_singularity) |> bind_rows()
convergence_issues <- model_list |> lapply(function(m) m$fit$convergence) |> bind_rows()
inclass <- model_list |> lapply(icc) |> bind_rows()

plots <- Map(function(name, model) {
  model_parameters(model) |>
    plot() +
    ggtitle(name)
}, names(model_list), model_list)

# Display all plots
plots


# drop1_results <- lapply(model_list, function(mod) {
#   tryCatch(
#     drop1(mod, test = "Chisq"),
#     error = function(e) e  # catch models where drop1 fails (e.g., zero-inflated)
#   )
# })
#single_sem <- model_list |> lapply(function(m) summary(psem(m)))

#Generate and store the check_model plots in a list
plot_list <- model_list |> lapply(check_model)
#plot_list |> lapply(print)
pdf(here("Figs/sem_model_diagnostics.pdf"), width = 11, height = 8.5)
invisible(plot_list |> lapply(print))
dev.off()

```

# 

```{r}

all_mod <- psem(
  ET_mm_day = ET_mm_day,
  water.temp = water.temp,
  upstream_length = upstream_length,
  PercWet = PercWet,
  excProb = excProb,
  headGradient = headGradient,
  avgDO.pctsat = avgDO.pctsat,
  DOpctsat.amp = DOpctsat.amp,
  avgDO.pctsat %~~% DOpctsat.amp,
  PercWet %~~% upstream_length
)
all_summary <- summary(all_mod) 

pruned_mod <- remove_weak_paths(sem_model =  all_mod)

pruned_summary <-  summary(pruned_mod, standardize = "none")  

plot_sem_graph(all_summary, file = here("Figs/SEM/all_fit_sem.png"))
plot_psem_chord(all_mod, var_domains, domain_colors, var_labels, file = here("Figs/SEM/all_fit_sem_chord.png"))

plot_sem_graph(pruned_summary, file = here("Figs/SEM/pruned_fit_sem.png"))
plot_psem_chord(pruned_mod, var_domains, domain_colors, var_labels, file = here("Figs/SEM/pruned_fit_sem_chord.png"))


```

```{r}

```

### 

```{r}

```

### Pooled Model

```{r}

```

### Flowing Model

```{r}

```

```{r}
relabel_path <- function(path, labels) {
  # Replace variable names in "response ~ predictor" format
  for (old in names(labels)) {
    new <- labels[[old]]
    path <- gsub(paste0("\\b", old, "\\b"), new, path)
  }
  path
}

## Flowing and Pooled Model Fit
pruned_summary
pooled_pruned_summary
flowing_pruned_summary

# List your SEM model summaries
sem_models <- list(
  Both = pruned_summary,
  Pooled = pooled_pruned_summary,
  Flowing = flowing_pruned_summary
)

# Extract all unique paths across models
extract_paths <- function(sem_summary) {
  coefs <- sem_summary$coefficients
  paste(coefs$Response, "˿", coefs$Predictor)
}

# Collect all paths from all models
all_paths <- sem_models |>
  lapply(extract_paths) |>
  unlist() |>
  unique() |>
  sort()

# Build a presence matrix
path_matrix <- sapply(sem_models, function(sem_summary) {
  model_paths <- extract_paths(sem_summary)
  all_paths %in% model_paths
})

# Convert to a data frame for better readability
path_table <- data.frame(
  Path = all_paths,
  as.data.frame(path_matrix)
)

# Optionally, convert logicals to checkmarks for display
path_table_formatted <- path_table |>
  dplyr::mutate(across(-Path, ~ ifelse(.x, "✅", "❌")))

# Keep only rows where pooled and flowing differ
diff_paths <- path_table[path_table$Pooled != path_table$Flowing, ]
diff_paths <- diff_paths |> 
  dplyr::mutate(across(-Path, ~ ifelse(.x, "✅", "❌")))

# Use HTML subscript formatting
var_labels <- c(
  "DOpctsat.amp" = "DO<sub>% Sat</sub> Amplitude",
  "DOSat.exc" = "DO<sub>% Sat</sub> Exceedance",
  "PPT_14d" = "2 Week Precip",
  "upstream_length" = "Upstream Length",
  "water.temp" = "Temp",
  "headGradient" = "Head Gradient",
  "excProb" = "Exceedance Probability",
  "PercWet" = "% Network Wet"
)

# Relabel paths
diff_paths <- diff_paths |>
  mutate(Path = relabel_path(Path, var_labels))

# Create HTML table and preview
path_kable <- diff_paths |>
  kable(format = "html", escape = FALSE,  # <- allow HTML tags
        align = "lccc", col.names = c("Path", "Both", "Pooled", "Flowing")) |>
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = FALSE)

# Save as temporary HTML
html_file <- tempfile(fileext = ".html")
save_kable(path_kable, file = html_file)

# High-resolution screenshot using zoom (2x or 3x usually looks great)
webshot2::webshot(
  url = html_file,
  file = here("Figs/PathTable.png"),
  zoom = 6      # Try 2 or 3 for better resolution
)



# View the table
diff_paths |>
  tibble::as_tibble() |>
  print(n = Inf)
library(kableExtra)
path_kable <- diff_paths |>
  tibble::as_tibble() |>
  kable(format = "html", align = "lccc", col.names = c("Path", "Both", "Pooled", "Flowing")) |> 
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = F)

# Save as temporary HTML
html_file <- tempfile(fileext = ".html")
save_kable(path_kable, file = html_file)

# High-resolution screenshot using zoom (2x or 3x usually looks great)
webshot2::webshot(
  url = html_file,
  file = here("Figs/PathTable.png"),
  zoom = 6      # Try 2 or 3 for better resolution
)

coef_pooled <- pooled_pruned_summary$coefficients
coef_flowing <- flowing_pruned_summary$coefficients
merged_coefs <- full_join(
  coef_pooled |> select(1:8) |> mutate(model = "pooled") |> select(Response, Predictor, Estimate, Std.Estimate, model),
  coef_flowing |> select(1:8)  |> mutate(model = "flowing") |> select(Response, Predictor, Estimate, Std.Estimate, model),
  by = c("Response", "Predictor"),
  suffix = c("_pooled", "_flowing")
)

changed_paths <- merged_coefs |>
  filter(
    sign(Std.Estimate_pooled) != sign(Std.Estimate_flowing) |
      abs(Std.Estimate_pooled - Std.Estimate_flowing) > 0.25
  ) |> 
  mutate(
    direction_changed = sign(Std.Estimate_pooled) != sign(Std.Estimate_flowing),
    abs_diff = abs(Std.Estimate_pooled - Std.Estimate_flowing),
    mean_abs = (abs(Std.Estimate_pooled) + abs(Std.Estimate_flowing)) / 2,
    percent_diff = ifelse(mean_abs == 0, NA, 100 * abs_diff / mean_abs)
  ) |> 
  select(-model_pooled, -model_flowing)
```

```{r}
# Select numeric predictors (excluding response variables)
sem_vars <- c(
  "avgPar", "PPT_14d",
  "water.temp",
  "upstream_length",
  "PercWet",
  "excProb",
  "headGradient",
  "DOSat.exc",
  "DOpctsat.amp"
)

semDat |>
  select(all_of(sem_vars)) |>
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = value)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Distributions of SEM Variables", x = NULL, y = "Count")

sem_plot_data <- semDat |>
  select(flowState, all_of(sem_vars), Site) |> 
  group_by(Site) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    across(
      where(is.numeric),
      ~ (. - mean(., na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(., na.rm = TRUE),
      .names = "{.col}"
    )
  ) |>
  ungroup()
# Define response variables
response_vars <- c("DOpctsat.amp", "DOSat.exc")

# Get predictor vars (everything else in sem_vars)
predictor_vars <- setdiff(sem_vars, response_vars)

# Pivot to long format
long_sem_data <- sem_plot_data |>
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(predictor_vars), names_to = "Predictor", values_to = "x") |>
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(response_vars), names_to = "Response", values_to = "y")

# Example Plot: DOpctsat.amp faceted by Predictor and flowState
plot_amp <- long_sem_data |>
  filter(Response == "DOpctsat.amp") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "blue") +
  facet_grid(flowState ~ Predictor, scales = "free") +
  labs(x = "", y = "DOpctsat.amp") +
  theme_few(base_size = 20)

# Example Plot: DOSat.exc faceted by Predictor and flowState
plot_exc <- long_sem_data |>
  filter(Response == "DOSat.exc") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "blue") +
  facet_grid(flowState ~ Predictor, scales = "free") +
  labs(x = "", y = "DOSat.exc") +
  theme_few(base_size = 20)

# Display plots
plot_amp
plot_exc

ggsave(filename = "doAmpLM.png", plot = plot_amp, path = here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 14.2875, units = "in", dpi = 600)
ggsave(filename = "doExcLM.png", plot = plot_exc, path = here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 14.2875, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```
